heading: Decisions of the Secretary; finality
label: 511 Decisions of the Secretary; finality
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior section 511 was renumbered .section 1511 of this titleProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 211(a) of this titlePub. L. 102–83, § 2(a)

Federal Rules of Civil ProcedureWrit of mandamus abolished in United States district courts, but relief available by appropriate action or motion, see rule 81, Title 28, Appendix, Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary shall decide all questions of law and fact necessary to a decision by the Secretary under a law that affects the provision of benefits by the Secretary to veterans or the dependents or survivors of veterans. Subject to subsection (b), the decision of the Secretary as to any such question shall be final and conclusive and may not be reviewed by any other official or by any court, whether by an action in the nature of mandamus or otherwise.
